rationale: The cited paper appears only once in a grouped parenthetical citation in the market-timing discussion, where it is used as general support for the claim that competing products can speed diffusion. The citing paper does not use Dekimpe et al.'s coupled-hazard approach, staged implementation/confirmation structure, or specific empirical setup in its own modeling. Instead, it relies on Bass-based segmentation and its own profitability framework, so this reference functions as background literature rather than a core input.
